content: agent1: Implementing 'Add Token Position Tracking' feature - adding return_positions param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py only, hopefully minimal overlap.

agent1: merged team/agent2 into agent1, resolved encode() signature conflict (transformers before return_positions, docstrings combined). Tests pass except 2 pre-existing flaky hypothesis roundtrip tests unrelated to our changes (present on team/main too). Pushed to team/agent1.
